INTRODUCTION AND STANDARD FOR REVIEW POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, BERNARD
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-01-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-07 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT A. MYLES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT WONG, BERNARD TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT FLAMENCO, GINA FLAMENCO, EBER (APPELLANT TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT) *JUDGMENT REVERSED ON APPEAL. APPELLANT TO TAKE NOTHING AS DAMAGES AS CROSS-COMPLAINT DISMISSED; FINAL $1000.00 PAYMENT CONDITIONED ON REPAIR OF LIVING ROOM CEILING WHICH DID NOT OCCUR. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:35am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondents, Eber Flamenco and Gina Flamenco appear in Pro Per; Appellant, Bernard Wong, appears through his attorney Mark Kertz, Esq.
Parties are sworn. Eber Flamenco presents his case, as respondent, in the narrative. Mr. Kertz presents the case for the appellant, Bernard Wong. Parties make brief closing remarks.
10:40am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is identified or admitted.
